item.title: Activate
item.description: Istanbul, Turkey Narrative: If you do not claim your greatness, someone else will.

item.title: Adobe Illustrator
item.description: Adobe Illustrator has always been a bit elusive to me. Despite that, you’ll notice it plays a significant role in my workflow.

item.title: Adobe Photoshop
item.description: Each image within this collection shares a connection to Adobe Photoshop, serving as the primary crucible from which the final artwork emerges.

item.title: Aeonian Agape
item.description: Fethiye, Turkey Narrative: The seeker and the sought, the observer and the observed, the self and the universe, dissolve into a seamless unity, akin to a drop merging into the boundless ocean of absolute consciousness.

item.title: Aham Brahmasmi
item.description: Istanbul, Turkey Narrative: “Aham Brahmasmi” is a profound expression rooted in ancient Indian philosophy, particularly in Advaita Vedanta, where it translates to “I am Brahman” or “I am the universe.” This concept suggests that the individual self (atman) is ultimately identical to the transcendent...

item.title: Alanya
item.description: Alanya was a transformative 2.5-year journey for us, a period where we reconnected with family on the Mediterranean coast.

item.title: Alaçatı
item.description: This period marked a bridge for us, a transition from the bustling metropolis to smaller towns.

item.title: Arcane Opulence
item.description: Istanbul, Turkey Narrative: “Arcane Opulence marks a significant shift in my life journey: on the brink of becoming a first-time father, I made the daring decision to leave behind my stable 9-5 career and embrace the path of a full-time professional artist.

item.title: Arcturian Template
item.description: Fethiye, Turkey Narrative: A cosmic map guiding souls on their journey of awakening, illuminating the path to higher consciousness and spiritual transformation Connections: Universal Transmissions Arcturus - Templates Collections: Geometrica Created with: Composition: Adobe Photoshop 3D: Cinema 4D O...
